steps.title: Find the initial value
steps.content: Use exponential form $h(x)=a\cdot b^x$. The table shows $h(0)=1.25$, so the initial value is $a=1.25$.

steps.title: Find the growth factor
steps.content:
The table also shows $h(2)=1.80$. Substitute that value.
$$1.25b^2=1.80$$
$$b^2=1.44$$
$$b=1.20$$

steps.title: Match the exponential model
steps.content:
The model is
$$h(x)=1.25(1.20)^x$$
It has the correct initial value and gives $h(2)=1.80$. The answer is D.
